_meta.title: Scale Image to Total Pixels Adv

inputs.exclude_tags: comic, greyscale, monochrome, text, letter, signature, watermark, page number, text focus, book, magazine, editorial, framework, border

inputs.prompt:
(NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, ABSOLUTELY NO HUMANS, NO MODELS, NO SKIN), act as a high-end luxury textile art director.
[Reference Strategy]: Use image1 for global color guidance and image2 as the "Microscopic Truth" to replicate the exact physical structure of the knit loops.
[Material Analysis]: The fabric is a delicate, pure white fine-gauge knit. Its core identity consists of rhythmic vertical stripes: columns of small, subtle heart-shaped pointelle motifs alternating with intricate braided cable-knit patterns.
[Composition Design]: Based on the fabric's soft drape, design an elegant studio composition: arrange the material into deep, cascading S-curves and soft diagonal folds that mimic the appearance of a serene, rolling snow-covered landscape.
[Bright & Airy Lighting]: Apply a high-key, luminous lighting setup. Use diffused professional light to make the white yarn glow with a fresh, pearlescent energy. Eliminate all harsh shadows; replace them with gentle micro-shadows that define the depth of the braids while maintaining a bright, exceptionally comfortable visual feel.
[Micro-Realism]: Avoid a "perfect" digital render look. Referring to the high-resolution crop in image2, replicate the organic "imperfections": include individual loose fiber fuzz (毛羽), realistic yarn tension, and the intricate, slightly irregular interlocking of the threads.
[Output Goal]: The final result must be an extreme macro close-up that is high-fidelity, sophisticated, and radiates a premium tactile soul.
